odeProperty.value: Project-based learning activity for English lessons focused on podcast creation and digital competence.

odeComponent.htmlView:
Welcome to this project!

In this project, students will create their own podcast in English about topics related to their daily lives and interests such as social media, the environment, technology or teenage life.

They will work collaboratively to:

  • plan their ideas
  • write a script
  • record their voices
  • edit audio
  • publish a final podcast

Level: 4º ESO

Subject: English

Duration: 10 sessions
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778611817220-m77s4k8id","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"CREATING A PODCAST","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Welcome to this project!

In this project, students will create their own podcast in English about topics related to their daily lives and interests such as social media, the environment, technology or teenage life.

They will work collaboratively to:

  • plan their ideas
  • write a script
  • record their voices
  • edit audio
  • publish a final podcast

Level: 4º ESO

Subject: English

Duration: 10 sessions

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
This project is based on Project-Based Learning and Cooperative Learning.

Students will create a real podcast in English using digital tools.  The process includes planning, scripting, rehearsing, recording, editing and publishing.

The aim is to improve:

  • oral communication in English
  • digital competence
  • teamwork skills
  • creativitiy
  • autonomy

The final product will be published on Padlet or the school platform.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778612126508-lhstiy10p","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This project is based on Project-Based Learning and Cooperative Learning.

Students will create a real podcast in English using digital tools.  The process includes planning, scripting, rehearsing, recording, editing and publishing.

The aim is to improve:

  • oral communication in English
  • digital competence
  • teamwork skills
  • creativitiy
  • autonomy

The final product will be published on Padlet or the school platform.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Students will:

  • improve spoken English
  • use digital tools responsibly
  • work collaboratively
  • develop creativity
  • create a digital audio product
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778612313540-69s3dztd0","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Students will:

  • improve spoken English
  • use digital tools responsibly
  • work collaboratively
  • develop creativity
  • create a digital audio product
","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
FINAL PRODUCT: PODCAST

Students will create a group podcast in English.

Requirements:

  • 3–5 minutes duration
  • clear structure (introduction, body, conclusion)
  • participation of all group members
  • correct pronunciation
  • edited audio

Possible topics:

  • Social media
  • Environment
  • Teen life
  • Technology
  • Music and culture

Final podcasts will be published online.

Padlet: https://padlet.com/

Audacity: https://www.audacityteam.org/
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778612437707-ic52x8zpg","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

FINAL PRODUCT: PODCAST

Students will create a group podcast in English.

Requirements:

  • 3–5 minutes duration
  • clear structure (introduction, body, conclusion)
  • participation of all group members
  • correct pronunciation
  • edited audio

Possible topics:

  • Social media
  • Environment
  • Teen life
  • Technology
  • Music and culture

Final podcasts will be published online.

Padlet: https://padlet.com/

Audacity: https://www.audacityteam.org/

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Students will follow digital safety rules:

  • No personal data will be shared
  • Respect copyright laws
  • Use only free or licensed resources
  • Respect netiquette rules 
  • Use digital tools responsibly

All work will be shared only in educational platforms approved by the teacher.

https://canva.link/6cxwndkwuo4r1yl
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778612570555-o04tvc47p","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Students will follow digital safety rules:

  • No personal data will be shared
  • Respect copyright laws
  • Use only free or licensed resources
  • Respect netiquette rules 
  • Use digital tools responsibly

All work will be shared only in educational platforms approved by the teacher.

https://canva.link/6cxwndkwuo4r1yl

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Padlet con recursos para el alumnado:

https://padlet.com/mpernav192/creating-a-podcast-in-4eso-j0pd9po2ofv306sc

Symbaloo con recursos para el profesorado:

http://www.symbaloo.com/embed/shared/AAAAA9O3tGQAA41_W3OZ5g==

odeComponent.htmlView:
• Session 1 → Introduction to podcasts (YouTube, Padlet)
  • Session 2 → Planning and roles (Google Docs)
  • Sessions 3–4 → Script writing (Google Docs)
  • Session 5 → Rehearsal and feedback (Mobile recorder)
  • Sessions 6–7 → Recording (Mobile/tablet)
  • Sessions 8–9 → Editing and publishing (Audacity, Padlet)
  • Session 10 → Final reflection (Google Forms)

Timeline: https://mm.tt/map/3997529463?t=yJlq7h7n9e
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778612681552-a492mk4bt","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"
  • Session 1 → Introduction to podcasts (YouTube, Padlet)
  • Session 2 → Planning and roles (Google Docs)
  • Sessions 3–4 → Script writing (Google Docs)
  • Session 5 → Rehearsal and feedback (Mobile recorder)
  • Sessions 6–7 → Recording (Mobile/tablet)
  • Sessions 8–9 → Editing and publishing (Audacity, Padlet)
  • Session 10 → Final reflection (Google Forms)

Timeline: https://mm.tt/map/3997529463?t=yJlq7h7n9e

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Students listen to podcasts in English and analyse:

  • topic
  • structure
  • vocabulary
  • pronunciation

  • topic
  • structure

odeComponent.htmlView:
Students decide:

  • topic
  • roles
  • structure

Roles:

  • Coordinator
  • Writer
  • Speaker
  • Technician

Google Docs: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Do5R1w5ALpFFfwBfNi4GQiy6zuObw0KyfBwIB5DwcoY/edit?usp=sharing

Canva: https://www.canva.com/es_es/

odeComponent.htmlView:
Students write the script collaboratively using Google Docs.

Teacher support:

  • vocabulary help
  • sentence models
  • guidance

Google Docs: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Do5R1w5ALpFFfwBfNi4GQiy6zuObw0KyfBwIB5DwcoY/edit?usp=sharing

odeComponent.htmlView:
Students practice pronunciation and fluency.

Peer feedback is used.

odeComponent.htmlView:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1EPwYFghuqkrTyokuaMnj2DzAiPYTev3wiGEZWa7nw58/edit?usp=drivesdk

%7B%22typeGame%22%3A%22Rubric%22%2C%22version%22%3A2%2C%22id%22%3A%22idevice-1778614959779-jsln8ugu6%22%2C%22table%22%3A%7B%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20de%20ejemplo%20%284x4%29%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%222.1.%20Expresar%20oralmente%20textos%20originales%20y%20creativos%20sencillos%20de%20extensi%F3n%20media%2C%20estructurados%2C%20comprensibles%2C%20coherentes%20y%20adecuados%20a%20la%20situaci%F3n%20comunicativa%20concreta%2C%20sobre%20asuntos%20de%20diversa%20%EDndole%2C%20cotidianos%2C%20de%20relevancia%20personal%20y%20de%20inter%E9s%20p%FAblico%20pr%F3ximo%20a%20su%20experiencia%20vital%20y%20cultural%2C%20con%20el%20fin%20de%20describir%2C%20narrar%2C%20explicar%2C%20argumentar%20e%20informar%2C%20en%20diferentes%20soportes%20anal%F3gicos%20y%20digitales%2C%20utilizando%20recursos%20verbales%20y%20no%20verbales%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%2C%20as%ED%20como%20estrategias%20de%20planificaci%F3n%2C%20control%2C%20compensaci%F3n%2C%20cooperaci%F3n%20y%20autorreparaci%F3n%22%2C%224.2.%20Aplicar%20estrategias%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%20y%20eficiente%2C%20que%20ayuden%20a%20crear%20puentes%2C%20faciliten%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20y%20sirvan%20para%20explicar%20y%20simplificar%20textos%2C%20conceptos%20y%20mensajes%20complejos%2C%20y%20que%20sean%20adecuadas%20a%20las%20intenciones%20comunicativas%2C%20las%20caracter%EDsticas%20contextuales%20%20y%20la%20tipolog%EDa%20textual%2C%20usando%20recursos%20y%20apoyos%20f%EDsicos%20o%20digitales%20en%20funci%F3n%20de%20las%20necesidades%20de%20cada%20momento%22%2C%223.1.%20Planificar%2C%20participar%20y%20colaborar%20activamente%20y%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%2C%20a%20trav%E9s%20de%20diversos%20soportes%20anal%F3gicos%20y%20digitales%2C%20en%20situaciones%20interactivas%20multimodales%20con%20diferentes%20interlocutores%2C%20sobre%20temas%20cotidianos%2C%20de%20relevancia%20personal%20y%20de%20inter%E9s%20p%FAblico%20cercanos%20a%20su%20experiencia%2C%20mostrando%20determinaci%F3n%2C%20empat%EDa%20y%20respeto%20por%20la%20cortes%EDa%20ling%FC%EDstica%20y%20la%20etiqueta%20digital%2C%20as%ED%20como%20por%20las%20diferentes%20necesidades%2C%20ideas%2C%20inquietudes%2C%20iniciativas%20y%20motivaciones%20de%20las%20y%20los%20interlocutores%20dando%20impulso%20a%20una%20comunicaci%F3n%20eficiente%2C%20responsable%20y%20segura%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%22Sobresaliente%20%289-10%20puntos%29%22%2C%22Notable%20%287-8%20%20puntos%29%22%2C%22Suficiente%20%285-6%20puntos%29%22%2C%22Insuficiente%20%281-4%20puntos%29%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20textos%20originales%2C%20creativos%2C%20coherentes%20y%20bien%20estructurados%20con%20gran%20fluidez%2C%20correcci%F3n%20y%20adecuaci%F3n%20comunicativa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20textos%20claros%2C%20estructurados%20y%20adecuados%2C%20utilizando%20recursos%20verbales%20y%20no%20verbales%20con%20autonom%EDa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20textos%20sencillos%20y%20comprensibles%2C%20aunque%20con%20limitada%20organizaci%F3n%2C%20fluidez%20o%20correcci%F3n.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20ideas%20de%20forma%20poco%20clara%2C%20desorganizada%20y%20con%20frecuentes%20dificultades%20de%20comprensi%F3n.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aplica%20de%20forma%20aut%F3noma%20y%20eficaz%20diversas%20estrategias%20y%20recursos%20adaptados%20al%20contexto%2C%20facilitando%20claramente%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20y%20comprensi%F3n%20de%20mensajes%20complejos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Utiliza%20estrategias%20adecuadas%20y%20recursos%20f%EDsicos%20o%20digitales%20que%20facilitan%20la%20comprensi%F3n%20y%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20de%20forma%20aut%F3noma.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aplica%20algunas%20estrategias%20b%E1sicas%20de%20comunicaci%F3n%20y%20utiliza%20apoyos%20sencillos%20con%20cierta%20ayuda.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Presenta%20dificultades%20para%20aplicar%20estrategias%20de%20comunicaci%F3n%20o%20necesita%20ayuda%20constante%20para%20hacerse%20entender.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%2C%20eficiente%20y%20colaborativa%2C%20impulsando%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20con%20respeto%2C%20empat%EDa%2C%20iniciativa%20y%20excelente%20adecuaci%F3n%20comunicativa%20y%20digital.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20activamente%20y%20de%20forma%20aut%F3noma%2C%20mostrando%20empat%EDa%2C%20respeto%20y%20uso%20adecuado%20de%20recursos%20anal%F3gicos%20y%20digitales.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20en%20situaciones%20comunicativas%20sencillas%20respetando%20generalmente%20las%20normas%20b%E1sicas%20de%20interacci%F3n%20y%20cortes%EDa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20de%20forma%20muy%20limitada%2C%20con%20escasa%20autonom%EDa%20y%20dificultades%20para%20respetar%20turnos%2C%20normas%20comunicativas%20o%20etiqueta%20digital.%22%7D%5D%5D%7D%2C%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20de%20ejemplo%20%284x4%29%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%222.1.%20Expresar%20oralmente%20textos%20originales%20y%20creativos%20sencillos%20de%20extensi%F3n%20media%2C%20estructurados%2C%20comprensibles%2C%20coherentes%20y%20adecuados%20a%20la%20situaci%F3n%20comunicativa%20concreta%2C%20sobre%20asuntos%20de%20diversa%20%EDndole%2C%20cotidianos%2C%20de%20relevancia%20personal%20y%20de%20inter%E9s%20p%FAblico%20pr%F3ximo%20a%20su%20experiencia%20vital%20y%20cultural%2C%20con%20el%20fin%20de%20describir%2C%20narrar%2C%20explicar%2C%20argumentar%20e%20informar%2C%20en%20diferentes%20soportes%20anal%F3gicos%20y%20digitales%2C%20utilizando%20recursos%20verbales%20y%20no%20verbales%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%2C%20as%ED%20como%20estrategias%20de%20planificaci%F3n%2C%20control%2C%20compensaci%F3n%2C%20cooperaci%F3n%20y%20autorreparaci%F3n%22%2C%224.2.%20Aplicar%20estrategias%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%20y%20eficiente%2C%20que%20ayuden%20a%20crear%20puentes%2C%20faciliten%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20y%20sirvan%20para%20explicar%20y%20simplificar%20textos%2C%20conceptos%20y%20mensajes%20complejos%2C%20y%20que%20sean%20adecuadas%20a%20las%20intenciones%20comunicativas%2C%20las%20caracter%EDsticas%20contextuales%20%20y%20la%20tipolog%EDa%20textual%2C%20usando%20recursos%20y%20apoyos%20f%EDsicos%20o%20digitales%20en%20funci%F3n%20de%20las%20necesidades%20de%20cada%20momento%22%2C%223.1.%20Planificar%2C%20participar%20y%20colaborar%20activamente%20y%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%2C%20a%20trav%E9s%20de%20diversos%20soportes%20anal%F3gicos%20y%20digitales%2C%20en%20situaciones%20interactivas%20multimodales%20con%20diferentes%20interlocutores%2C%20sobre%20temas%20cotidianos%2C%20de%20relevancia%20personal%20y%20de%20inter%E9s%20p%FAblico%20cercanos%20a%20su%20experiencia%2C%20mostrando%20determinaci%F3n%2C%20empat%EDa%20y%20respeto%20por%20la%20cortes%EDa%20ling%FC%EDstica%20y%20la%20etiqueta%20digital%2C%20as%ED%20como%20por%20las%20diferentes%20necesidades%2C%20ideas%2C%20inquietudes%2C%20iniciativas%20y%20motivaciones%20de%20las%20y%20los%20interlocutores%20dando%20impulso%20a%20una%20comunicaci%F3n%20eficiente%2C%20responsable%20y%20segura%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%22Sobresaliente%20%289-10%20puntos%29%22%2C%22Notable%20%287-8%20%20puntos%29%22%2C%22Suficiente%20%285-6%20puntos%29%22%2C%22Insuficiente%20%281-4%20puntos%29%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20textos%20originales%2C%20creativos%2C%20coherentes%20y%20bien%20estructurados%20con%20gran%20fluidez%2C%20correcci%F3n%20y%20adecuaci%F3n%20comunicativa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20textos%20claros%2C%20estructurados%20y%20adecuados%2C%20utilizando%20recursos%20verbales%20y%20no%20verbales%20con%20autonom%EDa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20textos%20sencillos%20y%20comprensibles%2C%20aunque%20con%20limitada%20organizaci%F3n%2C%20fluidez%20o%20correcci%F3n.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Expresa%20ideas%20de%20forma%20poco%20clara%2C%20desorganizada%20y%20con%20frecuentes%20dificultades%20de%20comprensi%F3n.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aplica%20de%20forma%20aut%F3noma%20y%20eficaz%20diversas%20estrategias%20y%20recursos%20adaptados%20al%20contexto%2C%20facilitando%20claramente%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20y%20comprensi%F3n%20de%20mensajes%20complejos.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Utiliza%20estrategias%20adecuadas%20y%20recursos%20f%EDsicos%20o%20digitales%20que%20facilitan%20la%20comprensi%F3n%20y%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20de%20forma%20aut%F3noma.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Aplica%20algunas%20estrategias%20b%E1sicas%20de%20comunicaci%F3n%20y%20utiliza%20apoyos%20sencillos%20con%20cierta%20ayuda.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Presenta%20dificultades%20para%20aplicar%20estrategias%20de%20comunicaci%F3n%20o%20necesita%20ayuda%20constante%20para%20hacerse%20entender.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20de%20manera%20aut%F3noma%2C%20eficiente%20y%20colaborativa%2C%20impulsando%20la%20comunicaci%F3n%20con%20respeto%2C%20empat%EDa%2C%20iniciativa%20y%20excelente%20adecuaci%F3n%20comunicativa%20y%20digital.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20activamente%20y%20de%20forma%20aut%F3noma%2C%20mostrando%20empat%EDa%2C%20respeto%20y%20uso%20adecuado%20de%20recursos%20anal%F3gicos%20y%20digitales.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20en%20situaciones%20comunicativas%20sencillas%20respetando%20generalmente%20las%20normas%20b%E1sicas%20de%20interacci%F3n%20y%20cortes%EDa.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%22%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Participa%20de%20forma%20muy%20limitada%2C%20con%20escasa%20autonom%EDa%20y%20dificultades%20para%20respetar%20turnos%2C%20normas%20comunicativas%20o%20etiqueta%20digital.%22%7D%5D%5D%2C%22instructions%22%3A%22%3Cp%3E%3Ca%20href%3D%5C%22https%3A//docs.google.com/document/d/1EPwYFghuqkrTyokuaMnj2DzAiPYTev3wiGEZWa7nw58/edit%3Fusp%3Ddrivesdk%5C%22%20title%3D%5C%22%5C%22%3Ehttps%3A//docs.google.com/document/d/1EPwYFghuqkrTyokuaMnj2DzAiPYTev3wiGEZWa7nw58/edit%3Fusp%3Ddrivesdk%3C/a%3E%3C/p%3E%22%2C%22visible-info%22%3Atrue%2C%22i18n%22%3A%7B%22rubric%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%22%2C%22activity%22%3A%22Actividad%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Nombre%22%2C%22date%22%3A%22Fecha%22%2C%22score%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22notes%22%3A%22Notas%22%2C%22download%22%3A%22Descargar%22%2C%22msgDelete%22%3A%22%BFSeguro%20que%20desea%20borrar%20todos%20los%20campos%20del%20formulario%3F%22%2C%22reset%22%3A%22Reiniciar%22%2C%22print%22%3A%22Imprimir%22%2C%22apply%22%3A%22Aplicar%22%2C%22newWindow%22%3A%22Ventana%20nueva%22%2C%22msgEndGameScore%22%3A%22Completa%20la%20r%FAbrica%20antes%20de%20guardar%20tu%20puntuaci%F3n.%22%2C%22msgScoreScorm%22%3A%22La%20puntuaci%F3n%20no%20se%20puede%20guardar%20porque%20esta%20p%E1gina%20no%20forma%20parte%20%20de%20un%20paquete%20SCORM.%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveScore%22%3A%22%A1Solo%20puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20una%20vez%21%22%2C%22msgYouScore%22%3A%22Su%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%20Solo%20puedes%20completarla%20una%20vez.%22%2C%22msgSaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20autom%E1ticamente%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%22%2C%22msgSeveralScore%22%3A%22Puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20tantas%20veces%20como%20quiera%22%2C%22msgYouLastScore%22%3A%22La%20%FAltima%20puntuaci%F3n%20guardada%20es%22%2C%22msgActityComply%22%3A%22Ya%20ha%20realizado%20esta%20actividad.%22%2C%22msgPlaySeveralTimes%22%3A%22Puede%20realizar%20esta%20actividad%20cuantas%20veces%20quiera%22%2C%22msgScore%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgWeight%22%3A%22Peso%22%7D%2C%22isScorm%22%3A0%2C%22textButtonScorm%22%3A%22Guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22repeatActivity%22%3Atrue%2C%22weighted%22%3A100%7D

  • Actividad
  • Nombre
  • Fecha
  • Puntuación
  • Notas
  • Descargar
  • ¿Seguro que desea borrar todos los campos del formulario?
  • Reiniciar
  • Imprimir
  • Aplicar
  • Ventana nueva
  • Completa la rúbrica antes de guardar tu puntuación.
  • La puntuación no se puede guardar porque esta página no forma parte de un paquete SCORM.
  • ¡Solo puede guardar la puntuación una vez!
  • Su puntuación
  • Tu puntuación se guardará después de cada cambio. Solo puedes completarla una vez.
  • Tu puntuación se guardará automáticamente después de cada cambio.
  • Puede guardar la puntuación tantas veces como quiera
  • La última puntuación guardada es
  • Ya ha realizado esta actividad.
  • Puede realizar esta actividad cuantas veces quiera
  • Puntuación
  • Peso
%3Cp%3E%3Ca%20href%3D%22https%3A//docs.google.com/document/d/1EPwYFghuqkrTyokuaMnj2DzAiPYTev3wiGEZWa7nw58/edit%3Fusp%3Ddrivesdk%22%20title%3D%22%22%3Ehttps%3A//docs.google.com/document/d/1EPwYFghuqkrTyokuaMnj2DzAiPYTev3wiGEZWa7nw58/edit%3Fusp%3Ddrivesdk%3C/a%3E%3C/p%3E
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScKofvhdEdlgIqMN0i3Razoi14_nHviNkS4Dg4T3-FzfCeGXw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=108921990361540319924

This project follows Universal Design for Learning (UDL):


- Multiple ways of representation (videos, texts, audio)

- Multiple ways of expression (speaking, writing, recording)

- Multiple ways of engagement (cooperative work, roles)


Adaptations:

- scaffolding for scripts

- vocabulary support

- flexible grouping

- teacher guidance

{"ideviceId":"idevice-1778613049612-arx7bd0c7","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This project follows Universal Design for Learning (UDL):


- Multiple ways of representation (videos, texts, audio)

- Multiple ways of expression (speaking, writing, recording)

- Multiple ways of engagement (cooperative work, roles)


Adaptations:

- scaffolding for scripts

- vocabulary support

- flexible grouping

- teacher guidance

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
This project is designed for 4º ESO English.


It integrates:

- communicative approach

- cooperative learning

- project-based learning

- digital competence


Tasks are linked to evaluation criteria:

- listening and comprehension

- oral production

- interaction

- digital production


The project is flexible and inclusive, following LOMLOE principles and DUA guidelines.

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ENPWcFyV6-o_tWNha2HR82JuXAXa_-eFHuvxsbcwq78/edit?usp=drivesdk

It integrates:

- cooperative learning

- digital competence


Tasks are linked to evaluation criteria:

- listening and comprehension

- oral production

- interaction

- digital production


The project is flexible and inclusive, following LOMLOE principles and DUA guidelines.

Author: Macarena Pérez Navarro

Course: Competencia Digital Docente B2

Project: Creating a Podcast


License: Creative Commons BY-NC-SA


Tools used:

- Google Docs

- Padlet

- Canva

- Audacity

- YouTube


This project is for educational use only.

odeComponent.htmlView:
Información general sobre este recurso educativo
Título CREATING A PODCAST- 4º ESO
Descripción Project-based learning activity for English lessons focused on podcast creation and digital competence.
Autoría Macarena Pérez Navarro
Licencia creative commons: attribution - share alike 4.0

Este contenido fue creado con eXeLearning, el editor libre y de fuente abierta diseñado para crear recursos educativos.
